title: Directive
description: Governance DNA archetype for Directive — identity-level normative constraints (DNA 'D'). Standalone first-class GSM class with independent lifecycle, typed by DirectiveArchetype. Fields: structure, purpose, modal, verb, qualifier.

structure.description: ID reference to the owning/authoring Structure that issues the Directive.

modal.description: Deontic obligation strength. MUST = mandatory (violation = non-compliance). SHOULD = recommended (violation = warning). MAY = optional (informational).

verb.description: Governance action expressing what the governance intent does to the quality dimension.

qualifier.description: ID reference to the Archetype that defines the viability dimension being governed. The Archetype's schema defines the measurable properties; Norms operationalizing this Directive MUST reference this same Archetype in their guard/predicate CEL expressions.

purpose.description: ID reference to the purposed/governed Structure.
